text: Repository hygiene audit for SCPN-QUANTUM-CONTROL resolved current main blockers: Link Check and Python 3.13 CI passed after the dashboard-link and microbenchmark fixes. CodeQL clear-text logging alerts closed after reducing FIM IBM readiness console output. Dependabot security and secret-scanning APIs returned no open alerts. After the replacement workflows passed, 119 classified safe GitHub Actions runs were deleted: cancelled runs plus failed main-branch runs superseded by later successful runs of the same workflow. Four Dependabot PRs remain open; PR #63 needs separate CI investigation.
